title: Multimodal preprocessing structure
description: Compare projector capabilities, media preprocessing structure, and positions without generating a chat response.
disabled_reason: No immutable compatible model/projector/media artifact tuple is registered, the parity producers do not yet have a qualified MTMD build feature, and the runner cannot yet resolve the three distinct artifact roles into each invocation.

source.note: Enable only after closing the artifact-tuple, producer build-feature, and runner role-path gaps together.
